steps.t: Nobottle can be found in eastern Yondershire. Salga Greengrass has asked you to explore the village of Nobottle.
The village of Long Cleeve can be found north of Nobottle in Yondershire. You should travel to Long Cleeve and talk to Rosalinda North-took.
